chapter_title.ar: باب حَدِّ الْقَطْعِ وَ كَيْفَ هُوَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 36 – Penalty (Hadd) of the cutting, and how it is to be

text: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي السَّارِقِ إِذَا أُخِذَ وَ قَدْ أَخَذَ الْمَتَاعَ وَ هُوَ فِي الْبَيْتِ لَمْ يَخْرُجْ بَعْدُ فَقَالَ لَيْسَ عَلَيْهِ الْقَطْعُ حَتَّى يَخْرُجَ بِهِ مِنَ الدَّارِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from al Sakuny,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said regarding the thief: ‘When he is seized and he has taken the goods, and he is in the house and not having come out. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no cutting upon him until he comes out with it (the goods) from the house’.
